02 — About

The Story Behind
The Strategy

Marketing, at its core, is about one thing: making your audience feel seen. Not campaigns. Not budgets. Not channels. When you speak directly to a human need, action follows. And the most powerful vehicle for that? Story.

Great marketing doesn't interrupt — it pulls people in. It weaves your message so naturally into a narrative that your audience doesn't just hear it, they feel it. That conviction has shaped every strategy I've built — and it started long before the boardrooms.

I began my career as a Marketing Intern at Imarisha SACCO, learning that financial products don't sell themselves — trust does. By speaking to members' real aspirations, not just their savings goals, and telling stories they recognised as their own, we grew membership by 22%.

That same truth followed me to Agricycle Global, where I led marketing across the US, Asia, and East Africa. Different cultures, different languages — but story is universal. We grew international sales by 35% not by shouting louder, but by telling a more compelling narrative.

At Diageo, where I currently serve as Senior E-Commerce Lead, I scale that philosophy with technology every day. AI-powered personalization is, at its best, precision storytelling — delivering the right story to the right person at exactly the right moment. The result so far? 32% YoY growth, $19M+ in revenue, and churn dropping from 45% to 32%.

Alongside Diageo, I run Nova Scale — a boutique consultancy where I partner with early-stage e-commerce businesses to find their story, own their voice, and grow with intention.

Nine years. Three continents. Four industries. One belief — marketing that makes people feel seen, told through stories that move them, is marketing that truly performs.

03 — Services

Four Pillars of
Performance

🎯
Brand & Content

Building narratives that make your audience feel seen — through content, story, and influence that compels action.

Social Media Marketing
Custom strategies tailored to your goals — from brand awareness to sales. I manage engagement, build communities, and leverage influencer partnerships to expand your reach.
Content Marketing
Valuable, audience-first content that educates, entertains, and converts — built around keywords, stories, and your brand voice.
Influencer Marketing
Identifying and partnering with the right voices to authentically amplify your brand to audiences that trust them.
Brand Strategy & Positioning
Defining who you are, who you serve, and why you matter — creating a brand narrative that sticks.
🔍
Visibility & Acquisition

Getting your brand in front of the right people, at the right moment, through search, paid media, and strategic market entry.

Search Engine Optimization
From keyword research to technical audits — improving your search visibility to drive consistent, high-quality organic traffic.
Paid Media / PPC
Data-driven ad campaigns across Google, Meta, TikTok, and LinkedIn — optimised for maximum ROAS and minimum wasted spend.
Go-to-Market & Market Entry
Strategic frameworks for launching products or entering new markets — localized, targeted, and built to exceed first-year targets.
💌
Engagement & Retention

Turning first-time buyers into loyal advocates through personalised email, lifecycle journeys, and AI-powered connection.

Email Marketing
Personalised campaigns and automated sequences that nurture leads through the funnel and turn one-time buyers into loyal customers.
Lifecycle Marketing
Mapping and optimising every stage of the customer journey — from first touch to long-term retention.
AI-Powered Personalization
Using predictive analytics and AI tools to deliver the right message, to the right person, at exactly the right moment.
📊
Analytics & Strategy

Transforming raw data into sharp decisions — tracking performance, uncovering insights, and optimising every marketing investment.

Web Analytics
Full-funnel tracking and reporting using GA4, Data Studio, and Tableau — turning numbers into clear, actionable strategy.
Data Analysis & Reporting
Deep-dive analysis that surfaces what's working, what's not, and exactly where to invest next.
E-Commerce Strategy
End-to-end e-commerce growth — from AOV optimisation and bundling to loyalty programs and conversion rate improvements.
Performance Marketing
Integrated marketing strategies built around one metric that matters — measurable, scalable, real-world results.
04 — Experience

Nine Years of
Proven Impact

Senior E-Commerce Lead, Kenya
